title: 箱中世界World in a Box
description: 这款整合包让你在长途探索时无需折返基地，借助随身携带的手提箱，随时就能进入箱中世界。This modpack allows you to explore on long - distance journeys without having to return to the base. With the portable suitcase at hand, you can enter the World in a Box at any time.
body:
这个整合包可以让你像游牧民族一样，到世界各地去旅行，过上旅居的生活，长途旅行途中无需折返基地，借助随身携带的手提箱，随时就能进入箱中世界。我会让这个世界充满各种冒险和探索元素，还有美丽的风景，动人的音乐，目前处于早起开发制作阶段，欢迎大家来提出意见。

This modpack allows you to travel around the world like a nomad and lead a life of living away from home. During long - distance travels, you don't have to return to the base. With the portable suitcase at hand, you can enter the World in a Box at any time. I will fill this world with various adventure and exploration elements, as well as beautiful scenery and charming music. Currently, it is in the early stage of development and production. Everyone is welcome to offer their suggestions.
